ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Canace. Tragedia del sig(nor) Sperone Speroni
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Alla quale sono aggiunte alcune altre sue compositioni et una Apologia et alcune Lettioni in difesa della tragedia.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: `Canace` was presented to the Accademia degli Infiammati, as the author was writing it. The `Lezioni` were presented at the Accademia degli Elevati. See Speroni, `Apologia`, and `Lezioni`, ed. Christina Roaf (1982), pp. 118, 221.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
